texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONTRACT RATES AGREEMENT 2025 TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: CONTRACT RATES AGREEMENT 2025 TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates are non-commissionable and inclusive of all relevant taxes. In the event of increase in any Government tax, levy, currency fluctuation, fuel surcharges, increase in operating cost, or service charge, beyond our control, we reserve the right to adjust all contract rates accordingly from the date of such change without prior notice.
texts.text: All rates are non-commissionable and inclusive of all relevant taxes. In the event of increase in any Government tax, levy, currency fluctuation, fuel surcharges, increase in operating cost, or service charge, beyond our control, we reserve the right to adjust all contract rates accordingly from the date of such change without prior notice.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates are in US Dollars except for East Africa Residents in Kenya Shillings.
texts.text: Rates are in US Dollars except for East Africa Residents in Kenya Shillings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Rates attached shall apply to reservations operated in 2025.
texts.text: Rates attached shall apply to reservations operated in 2025.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Check-In & Check-Out Times:
texts.text: Check-In & Check-Out Times:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-in time is at 14:00 Hrs.
texts.text: Check-in time is at 14:00 Hrs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-out time is 10:00 Hrs. Regardless of arrival time.
texts.text: Check-out time is 10:00 Hrs. Regardless of arrival time.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Late check-out after 10:00 Hrs and until 13:00 Hrs, will be charged at U$ 100.00 per Adult and US$ 50.00 per Child.
texts.text: Late check-out after 10:00 Hrs and until 13:00 Hrs, will be charged at U$ 100.00 per Adult and US$ 50.00 per Child.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: This amount will include lunch if required.
texts.text: This amount will include lunch if required.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Subject to room availability, the camp will, at its sole discretion, endeavor to accommodate requests for early arrivals and/or late check outs.
texts.text: Subject to room availability, the camp will, at its sole discretion, endeavor to accommodate requests for early arrivals and/or late check outs.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy:
texts.text: Child Policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For child/children accompanying an adult and in same room:
texts.text: For child/children accompanying an adult and in same room:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Up to 3 years old sharing with adult/s - Free of Charge (accommodation and activities)
texts.text: Up to 3 years old sharing with adult/s - Free of Charge (accommodation and activities)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: From 4 years old up to 12 years old sharing with 1 or 2 adults as per rate card 13 years and over the Adult Rate will apply.
texts.text: From 4 years old up to 12 years old sharing with 1 or 2 adults as per rate card 13 years and over the Adult Rate will apply.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Occupancy:
texts.text: Occupancy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kandili Camps has 11 Tents
texts.text: Kandili Camps has 11 Tents

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Superior Tents N. 1 & N. 2 can accommodate 2 adults in each, or 2 adults and 2 children, and operates as a family room with an interconnecting lounge area.
texts.text: Superior Tents N. 1 & N. 2 can accommodate 2 adults in each, or 2 adults and 2 children, and operates as a family room with an interconnecting lounge area.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Superior Tents from N. 3 to N. 6 can accommodate a maximum of 3 people
texts.text: Superior Tents from N. 3 to N. 6 can accommodate a maximum of 3 people

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Standard Tents from N. 7 to N. 9 can accommodate a maximum of 2 people as a Double Only
texts.text: Standard Tents from N. 7 to N. 9 can accommodate a maximum of 2 people as a Double Only

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Suites F & G can accommodate a maximum of 4 people (1 Double + 2 Extra Beds)
texts.text: Suites F & G can accommodate a maximum of 4 people (1 Double + 2 Extra Beds)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Excursions & Other services:
texts.text: Excursions & Other services:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All excursions and other services besides full board accommodation, conservancy fees and walk, are charged at an extra cost. Minimum 2 passengers on all excursions are required.
texts.text: All excursions and other services besides full board accommodation, conservancy fees and walk, are charged at an extra cost. Minimum 2 passengers on all excursions are required.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Availability & Provisional booking:
texts.text: Availability & Provisional booking:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our contacts are: +254 (0) 748 152968 or write an email to: booking@kandilicamp.com and always copy info@kandilicamp.com
texts.text: Our contacts are: +254 (0) 748 152968 or write an email to: booking@kandilicamp.com and always copy info@kandilicamp.com

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Once you have checked availability you may book provisionally via email
texts.text: Once you have checked availability you may book provisionally via email

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Once a booking has been provisionally made in writing, the room will be held for maximum of 72 hours. You are required to confirm the booking prior to the 72 hours, otherwise this will automatically expire.
texts.text: Once a booking has been provisionally made in writing, the room will be held for maximum of 72 hours. You are required to confirm the booking prior to the 72 hours, otherwise this will automatically expire.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment Terms and Conditions, based on the seasons apply, as a final confirmation of the booking. Unpaid bookings are not confirmed bookings.
texts.text: Payment Terms and Conditions, based on the seasons apply, as a final confirmation of the booking. Unpaid bookings are not confirmed bookings.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Confirmed Booking:
texts.text: Confirmed Booking:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A booking will only be confirmed once a deposit has been received.
texts.text: A booking will only be confirmed once a deposit has been received.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please ensure we receive the following information along with your confirmation:
texts.text: Please ensure we receive the following information along with your confirmation:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. Date and Time of arrival and departure.
texts.text: Date and Time of arrival and departure.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Mode of arrival and departure (by road, by air)
texts.text: Mode of arrival and departure (by road, by air)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. Number of guests, rooming list, dietary requirements, configuration requested. (Doubles, twins, singles, etc and Kandili Camps will provide said configuration subject to availability)
texts.text: Number of guests, rooming list, dietary requirements, configuration requested. (Doubles, twins, singles, etc and Kandili Camps will provide said configuration subject to availability)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. Extra activities beyond the Full Board Accommodation if payable by the Agent
texts.text: Extra activities beyond the Full Board Accommodation if payable by the Agent

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 5. If booking East Africa Residents - please indicate this clearly.
texts.text: If booking East Africa Residents - please indicate this clearly.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Payment Terms:
texts.text: Payment Terms:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment Terms must be adhered to and must be made in the nominated currency stated. A deposit of 30% is required to confirm a booking and full payment must be made to Kandili Camps Ltd. Full Payment 60 days before arrival in Peak season (01/07/2025 - 31/10/2025 and from 23/12/2025 - 06/01/2026) Full Payment 45 days before arrival in Low, Green and Mid seasons (01/04/2025 to 14/06/2025 and from 01/11/2025 to 22/12/2025 and 07/01/2025 - 31/03/2025 and 15/06/2025-30/06/2025)
texts.text: Payment Terms must be adhered to and must be made in the nominated currency stated. A deposit of 30% is required to confirm a booking and full payment must be made to Kandili Camps Ltd. Full Payment 60 days before arrival in Peak season (01/07/2025 - 31/10/2025 and from 23/12/2025 - 06/01/2026) Full Payment 45 days before arrival in Low, Green and Mid seasons (01/04/2025 to 14/06/2025 and from 01/11/2025 to 22/12/2025 and 07/01/2025 - 31/03/2025 and 15/06/2025-30/06/2025)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Management reserves the right to deny services should payment not be made in accordance with this agreement.
texts.text: The Management reserves the right to deny services should payment not be made in accordance with this agreement.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cheques:
texts.text: Cheques:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To be drawn to Kandili Camps Ltd.
texts.text: To be drawn to Kandili Camps Ltd.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bank Transfers to Kandili Camps Ltd (account details provided in the invoice)
texts.text: Bank Transfers to Kandili Camps Ltd (account details provided in the invoice)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation and reduction in number policy:
texts.text: Cancellation and reduction in number policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All cancellations must be received in writing to Kandili Camp: booking@kandilicamp.com and always copy info@kandilicamp.com Cancellation must be acknowledged by Kandili Camps in writing. In case of cancellation or reduction in numbers, the below charges will be applied as a percentage of the booking value:
texts.text: All cancellations must be received in writing to Kandili Camp: booking@kandilicamp.com and always copy info@kandilicamp.com Cancellation must be acknowledged by Kandili Camps in writing. In case of cancellation or reduction in numbers, the below charges will be applied as a percentage of the booking value:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Between 60 & 35 days prior to arrival: 30% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 60 & 35 days prior to arrival: 30% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Between 34 & 20 days prior arrival: 50% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 34 & 20 days prior arrival: 50% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Between 19 days & a No Show: 100% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 19 days & a No Show: 100% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Refunds:
texts.text: Refunds:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should any client arrive late or request an early departure, no refund will be granted. Whilst Kandili Camp management will ensure that all anticipated accommodation will be available as planned, there shall be no claim of any nature against Kandili Camps Limited for a refund (either in part or whole), if any accommodation is unavailable and a reasonable alternative was found - or if guests were unable to make use of the services for any reason. Any refunds made will be at the discretion of Kandili Camps Ltd.
texts.text: Should any client arrive late or request an early departure, no refund will be granted. Whilst Kandili Camp management will ensure that all anticipated accommodation will be available as planned, there shall be no claim of any nature against Kandili Camps Limited for a refund (either in part or whole), if any accommodation is unavailable and a reasonable alternative was found - or if guests were unable to make use of the services for any reason. Any refunds made will be at the discretion of Kandili Camps Ltd.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Credit/Debit Card Policy:
texts.text: Credit/Debit Card Policy:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payments for accommodation can be done by cash, bank transfer or Credit/debit card link. Card link incur a charge which will be bore by the client. Bank charges are to be bore by the remitter.
texts.text: Payments for accommodation can be done by cash, bank transfer or Credit/debit card link. Card link incur a charge which will be bore by the client. Bank charges are to be bore by the remitter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any client paying by credit/debit card will be requested to share a copy of their passport or ID before payment is made.
texts.text: Any client paying by credit/debit card will be requested to share a copy of their passport or ID before payment is made.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All payments for the extras are to be settled by cash or card only upon check-out. US$, Euro or Kenyan Shillings are accepted.
texts.text: All payments for the extras are to be settled by cash or card only upon check-out. US$, Euro or Kenyan Shillings are accepted.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: US$ notes accepted from the Year 2009 only.
texts.text: US$ notes accepted from the Year 2009 only.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All foreign currency notes should not have any ink marks nor any tears. The management will not accept them.
texts.text: All foreign currency notes should not have any ink marks nor any tears. The management will not accept them.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurances:
texts.text: Insurances:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kandili Camp strongly recommends all guests take out comprehensive travel insurance cover. This insurance should cover cancellation and curtailment, all medical expenses including evacuation/repatriation, personal baggage, personal liability, death and permanent disability and travel documents insurance.
texts.text: Kandili Camp strongly recommends all guests take out comprehensive travel insurance cover. This insurance should cover cancellation and curtailment, all medical expenses including evacuation/repatriation, personal baggage, personal liability, death and permanent disability and travel documents insurance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Kandili Camp Ltd. is not responsible for any of the costs arising from such loss, injury and any other incident that may occur.
texts.text: Kandili Camp Ltd. is not responsible for any of the costs arising from such loss, injury and any other incident that may occur.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A copy of this agreement should be signed and returned, as confirmation of the acceptance of the terms and conditions outlined herein. Should this agreement not be returned signed, the use of these rates automatically results in the acceptance by the client of the pricing and all the booking terms and conditions as stated.
texts.text: A copy of this agreement should be signed and returned, as confirmation of the acceptance of the terms and conditions outlined herein. Should this agreement not be returned signed, the use of these rates automatically results in the acceptance by the client of the pricing and all the booking terms and conditions as stated.

texts.orig: THIS CONTRACT SUPERSEDES ANY OTHER PREVIOUSLY ISSUED. FOR: Kandili Camps Ltd.
